items.name: Roy El Hachi
items.text: DFW Tire Shop always does it right. Third time here and always left happy. Highly recommend for your car work.

items.name: Yrayyub
items.text: Yousef was extremely helpful and honest. Discount Tire said I needed 3 tires — Yousef checked and said I only needed 1. I cannot recommend them enough!

items.name: Michael Tirado
items.text: One of the best shops in the metroplex. The guys at DFW Tire are fast, responsive, honest, and will get the job done at a good price.

items.name: Chris Mck
items.text: Awesome service, fast, and probably the best prices I've ever seen. Hands down best all around. I'll be back!

items.name: Rusha
items.text: Great tires, quick and easy service, and the price was really reasonable. I highly recommend anyone needing tires to stop by!

items.name: Katey C.
items.text: Great guys to work with! We had tires put on both our truck and SUV. Great job balancing and all at a great price.

aboutPage.heading: About DFW Tire Wholesale
aboutPage.story: Located on Dalworth Street in the heart of Arlington, DFW Tire Wholesale has been the DFW Metroplex's go-to source for quality tires at honest prices. We're not a big chain — we're a local, family-run shop where you'll be greeted by name and treated with respect. Our philosophy is simple: Responsive, Reliable, Reasonable. We believe every driver deserves safe, dependable tires without breaking the bank. That's why our team hand-inspects every tire and never pushes a sale you don't need.

team.name: Mike
team.description: The go-to guy. Customers love Mike for his fast work and honest advice. If you need it done right, ask for Mike.

team.name: Yousef
team.description: The tire expert. Yousef's product knowledge is unmatched — he'll make sure you get exactly what you need, nothing more.

team.name: Joseph
team.description: The people person. Joseph takes care of friends and family — and at DFW Tire, every customer is both.

threeRs.title: Responsive
threeRs.description: We're here when you need us. Fast service, no runaround.

threeRs.title: Reliable
threeRs.description: Quality tires and honest work you can count on, every time.

threeRs.title: Reasonable
threeRs.description: The best prices in DFW. Period.
